title: Custom Made
description:
Vanilla+ Fabric pack with mods such as: 
Better Combat
Create Fabric
Spell Engine
Bosses of Mass Destruction
Simply Swords
and More!
body: Created this modpack with the intent of making a Fabric Vanilla+ pack with Create mod, spells, guns, extra weapons and bosses. Main terrain generation mods are from Stardust Labs: terralith, incendium, nullscape. There are no additional dimensions to minimize bloat. 1 mod that might be removed in the near future is better combat as it is drastically different from vanilla gameplay. However, that same mod complements many of the spell and melee weapon mods in the pack.
